children.text: in American Samoa, Guam, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico, and the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands;
for any Indian tribe or tribal organization (as those terms are defined in ); andsection 5304 of title 25

children.label: i
children.text: recognized and defined under Federal law as indigenous people of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: assists in the social, cultural, and educational development of such people in that community.

children.heading: Inflation adjustment
children.label: b Inflation adjustment
children.text: The Secretary shall adjust the dollar amount specified in subsection (a) on an annual basis for inflation.

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: c Inclusion
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “study” includes a watershed assessment.

children.heading: Application
children.label: d Application
children.text: The Secretary shall apply the waiver amount described in subsection (a) to reduce only the non-Federal share of study and project costs.
